description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet styled after the iconic Pac-Man machine. The front features a large, vertically oriented screen displaying the Pac-Man game, surrounded by a dark bezel and topped with a brightly lit marquee that reads 'PAC-MAN' in blue letters. Below the screen is a control panel with a blue joystick and several colored buttons, arranged for single-player gameplay, and a coin slot area. The cabinet is constructed from a wood-like material with a yellow finish, and the lower front panel is decorated with Pac-Man character artwork. The side panels are plain yellow with no visible graphics or decals. The back of the cabinet is solid and unadorned, showing the simple, boxy construction typical of vintage arcade machines.
description: A yellow upright Pac-Man arcade cabinet with a large screen, blue marquee, and a control panel featuring a joystick and buttons. The front displays Pac-Man artwork, while the sides are plain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pac-Man marquee, game screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, coin slot, and Pac-Man artwork on the lower panel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's angled profile, plain yellow side panel, and the protruding control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned yellow back of the cabinet with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Angled side-front view highlighting the control panel's layout and the cabinet's overall shape.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, vertically oriented, flat front with a thick bezel surrounding the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one blue joystick and four colored buttons arranged in a row, with a coin slot area below
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'PAC-MAN' logo in large blue letters on a yellow background, illuminated and styled in a retro arcade theme
